title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought major improvements to data import reliability and Salesforce deployment stability. We enhanced error recovery across the platform, making your automation workflows more resilient when unexpected issues occur. Several critical fixes ensure HubSpot integrations work properly and Salesforce deployments handle complex scenarios more smoothly.

entries.headline: Enhanced data import reliability and workflow enrichment
Salesforce deployments now recover automatically from errors
Plugin names now display consistently across the platform
Restored missing historical data from weeks 12 and 13
Better Salesforce state and country field detection with retry logic
details: Now automatically detects when Salesforce state and country picklists might cause deployment issues
Added automatic retry capability for failed operations

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployments now use enhanced workflow routing
Restored HubSpot integration functionality after critical file recovery
